<!-- Auto Generated Below -->


## Properties

| Property      | Attribute      | Description                                           | Type     | Default |
| ------------- | -------------- | ----------------------------------------------------- | -------- | ------- |
| `returnValue` | `return-value` | Valor enviado al dialog cuando se solicita el cierre. | `string` | `''`    |


## Events
